controls.label: Does your business have an Alternative Identity Proofing process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have an Alternative Identity Proofing process in place. You must establish a documented Alternative Identity Proofing process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Has the customer been unable to establish identity using standard customer identification requirements due to lack of necessary information or evidence?
controls.detail-label: Describe the circumstances preventing standard identity establishment
controls.remediation: Your Alternative Identity Proofing process requires documentation of the specific reason why standard customer identification under Chapter 4 cannot be used. Record the circumstances under which the customer cannot obtain or provide necessary identity information, as required by rule 4.15.1.

controls.label: Has your reporting entity established a process to accept self-attestation from customers when standard alternative identity proofing cannot be used?
controls.detail-label: Describe your self-attestation process and documentation requirements
controls.remediation: Your Alternative Identity Proofing process does not include a mechanism to accept customer self-attestation when identity cannot be established under rules 4.15.1 or 4.15.1A. Implement a self-attestation process that requires customers to certify the truthfulness of their identity information, as required by rule 4.15.2.

controls.label: Does your reporting entity apply appropriate levels of ongoing customer due diligence when customer identity is established via self-attestation?
controls.detail-label: Describe how ongoing due diligence is calibrated for self-attested identities
controls.remediation: Your Alternative Identity Proofing process does not include ongoing customer due diligence specifically designed to manage ML/TF risk associated with self-attested identities. Implement enhanced or appropriate ongoing due diligence measures to identify, mitigate, and manage risks where identity was established via self-attestation, as required by rule 4.15.3.

controls.label: Does your reporting entity have controls to avoid relying on self-attestation that is known or reasonably believed to be incorrect or misleading?
controls.detail-label: Describe your controls for detecting and rejecting false or misleading self-attestations
controls.remediation: Your Alternative Identity Proofing process lacks controls to detect and refuse self-attestations that are known or reasonably suspected to be false or misleading. Implement verification procedures and staff training to identify inconsistencies or red flags that would indicate unreliability of self-attested information, as required by rule 4.15.4.

controls.label: Does your reporting entity have a process to accept copies of identity documents (rather than originals or certified copies) when COVID-19 Pandemic measures prevent obtaining verified documents?
controls.detail-label: Describe your process for verifying document copies during COVID-19 restrictions
controls.remediation: Your Alternative Identity Proofing process does not include a procedure for accepting uncertified copies of identity documents when COVID-19 Pandemic measures prevent obtaining original or certified documents. Implement a risk-based process to verify copies of documents in these circumstances, as required by rule 4.15.5.

controls.label: Does your reporting entity correctly define 'COVID-19 Pandemic measures' to include government-recommended measures, your own reasonable measures, and customer reasonable measures?
controls.remediation: Your Alternative Identity Proofing process does not correctly define the scope of COVID-19 Pandemic measures. The definition must include measures implemented or recommended by an Australian government body, reasonable measures adopted by your reporting entity, and reasonable measures adopted by customers or foreign locations, as specified in rule 4.15.6.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: Eligibility for Alternative Identity Proofing
groups.description: Circumstances under which your reporting entity may depart from standard customer identification requirements and pursue alternative identity proofing.

groups.title: Acceptance of Self-Attestation
groups.description: Process for accepting customer self-attestation when neither standard nor alternative identity proofing can establish identity.

groups.title: ML/TF Risk Management for Self-Attested Identities
groups.description: Ongoing due diligence and risk assessment specifically for customers whose identities were established via self-attestation.

groups.title: Safeguards Against False or Misleading Self-Attestation
groups.description: Controls to detect and reject self-attestations that are known or reasonably believed to be incorrect or misleading.

groups.title: Alternative Verification During COVID-19 Pandemic
groups.description: Process for accepting document copies instead of originals or certified copies when COVID-19 Pandemic measures prevent obtaining verified documents.

groups.title: Definition of COVID-19 Pandemic Measures
groups.description: Understanding of what constitutes 'COVID-19 Pandemic measures' for purposes of alternative identity proofing and verification.

groups.title: Risk-Based Systems and Controls
groups.description: Application of ML/TF risk assessment to determine when and how to implement alternative identity proofing procedures.
